gt_sql: SELECT t1.name, SUM(t2.home_team_goal) + SUM(t2.away_team_goal) FROM League AS t1 INNER JOIN Match AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.league_id GROUP BY t1.name ORDER BY SUM(t2.home_team_goal) + SUM(t2.away_team_goal) ASC LIMIT 5
pred_sql:
SELECT l.name, SUM(m.home_team_goal) + SUM(m.away_team_goal)
FROM League l
JOIN Match m ON l.id = m.league_id
GROUP BY l.name
ORDER BY SUM(m.home_team_goal) + SUM(m.away_team_goal) ASC
LIMIT 5;
question: List the top 5 leagues in ascending order of the number of goals made in all seasons combined.
